comparison_question_families.research_question: Directly tests how highly correlated components may be licensed as one predictive individual without mistaking a common-driver alias for unity.
Tests whether Hilbert, complex, probabilistic and purification structure is derived or installed.
Supplies formal alternatives to globally directed causal order and a harder comparator than merely relabeling Wolfram causal edges.
Compares finite quantum chiral dynamics and continuum recovery against Joshua's proposed engine architecture.
Makes alias collapse, probe-directed refinement and schedule reduction exact rather than LLM-judged.

purgatory_policy: No permanent exclusions. Failed, incomplete, and packet-out-of-scope programs retain receipts and may be re-offered under changed constraints.
